summary: Iteration 184: Tested vendor language removal, mobile filter drawer, and VAT parity. Backend APIs working correctly. Vendor language successfully removed from all customer-facing pages. Mobile filter drawer working as expected. ISSUE FOUND: Checkout Order Summary sidebar does not display VAT breakdown (Subtotal, VAT 18%, Total) even though backend returns correct VAT data.

ui_bugs.issue: VAT breakdown (Subtotal, VAT 18%, Total) not displayed in Order Summary sidebar. Shows only 'Total TZS 8,000' instead of showing Subtotal TZS 8,000, VAT 18% TZS 1,440, Total TZS 9,440. The 'Amount to Transfer' section correctly shows TZS 9,440.
ui_bugs.root_cause: The OrderSummary component has hasVat check (vatPercent > 0 && vatAmount > 0) but VAT line is not rendering. The displayVatPercent and displayVatAmount props may not be passed correctly or the component is not re-rendering after orderSnapshot is set.

action_items: Fix VAT display in PublicCheckoutPage OrderSummary component - the hasVat condition or prop passing needs debugging
Verify that displayVatPercent and displayVatAmount are correctly calculated and passed to OrderSummary
Check if orderSnapshot.vat_percent and orderSnapshot.vat_amount are being set correctly after API response
critical_code_review_comments: PublicCheckoutPage.jsx line 416-419: displayVatPercent and displayVatAmount calculation looks correct but VAT line not rendering
OrderSummary component line 56: hasVat = vatPercent > 0 && vatAmount > 0 - check if props are numbers or undefined

success_rate.frontend: 90% (vendor language removal PASS, mobile filter PASS, VAT display PARTIAL FAIL)

test_credentials: No login required for public pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: VAT parity backend is working correctly - /api/public/payment-info returns vat_percent:18, /api/public/checkout returns correct subtotal/vat_amount/total. The issue is frontend-only: OrderSummary component in PublicCheckoutPage.jsx is not displaying the VAT breakdown even though the data is available. The 'Amount to Transfer' section correctly shows the VAT-inclusive total (e.g., TZS 9,440 for an 8,000 item), but the Order Summary sidebar shows only 'Total TZS 8,000' without Subtotal and VAT 18% lines.

vendor_language_removal.landing_page: PASS - No vendor/supplier language in hero, how-it-works, trust signals, testimonials
vendor_language_removal.terms_page: PASS - Uses 'Fulfillment Network' and 'fulfillment partner' terminology

mobile_filter_drawer.desktop_1920px: PASS - Shows inline filter rail with search, group, category, subcategory, sort dropdowns
mobile_filter_drawer.mobile_375px: PASS - Shows compact search bar + horizontal Filter/Sort buttons
mobile_filter_drawer.filter_drawer: PASS - Opens bottom sheet with Group, Category, Subcategory selects
mobile_filter_drawer.sort_dropdown: PASS - Shows sort options (Relevance, Newest, Low→High, High→Low)

vat_parity.api_checkout: PASS - Returns subtotal, vat_percent, vat_amount, total correctly
vat_parity.checkout_order_summary: FAIL - Does not show VAT breakdown (Subtotal, VAT 18%, Total)
